name: io.github.aigovops-foundation/governed-core
title: AiGovOps Governed Core
description: Route any AI agent's effectful actions through the AiGovOps Yes-Gate: propose -> human decide -> brokered scoped token -> sandboxed run -> signed receipt. Dependency-free; a steward holds a global kill switch.
_note: Registry-listing SCAFFOLD only. NOT yet published — submit to the MCP registry (PR/API) when ready. Filling in a real namespace + publishing is an operator step (needs the registry account).
